hero.title: A mobile library that brings a story to every station
hero.subtitle: A graduation project website with books, shopping, route tracking, and full bilingual content management.
hero.extraDescription: An innovative graduation project aiming to spread culture and reading through a mobile library that travels between train stations, making every journey an opportunity to discover a world of knowledge.
home.storyTitle: A world of books is waiting
home.aboutBody1: Ofoq is a pioneering cultural and community project aimed at breaking down barriers between readers and books. We don't just offer books; we offer a unique experience that combines the tranquility of the sea with the beauty of outdoor reading.
home.aboutBody2: Our library moves between Alexandria's coastal stations, providing a wide range of paper and audiobooks, along with comfortable seating and advanced digital services for route tracking and online ordering.
home.latestBooksSubtitle: A selected collection of the newest books available in the mobile library.
home.topStopsSubtitle: The main Alexandria stations served by the mobile library.

currency.label: Select Currency
about.missionText: Ofoq aims to democratize access to literature by bringing books directly to people's daily commutes. We believe that every station is an opportunity for a new story.
about.visionText: To become the leading mobile cultural hub in Egypt, fostering a community of lifelong readers through innovative and accessible library services.
about.impactText: By visiting various coastal stations, we've engaged thousands of readers, supported local literacy initiatives, and created a unique cultural landmark in Alexandria.
